creator: crest@bultmann.eu
text:
Created attachment 198199
Update nanomsg to version 1.1.5

The nanomsg port was stuck at version 1.1.0 due to my inaction. This patch brings it the port up to date.

Tested:

  * portlint (passed)
  * nanomsg's own regression tests (passed)
  * poudriere (passed on FreeBSD 11.2-p4/amd64)

Please commit this patch.
